candidate_definition_hints.text: **Note:** The next release will be 2.0.0 (unreleased). It migrates fully from `gym` to `gymnasium`. EnvPool support has been restored with the new envpool 1.1.1 (Python 3.11–3.14, NumPy 2.x, MuJoCo 3.x compatible).
